title: Ping Pong!
description:
A sweet and quirky little mod that jumbles up your text in a Ping Pong method. 🏓
/pingpong
body:
# How does Ping Pong work?
As the name implies, your string of text gets jumbled around in a (sort of) ping pong pattern using the **/pingpong** command. You can see how this works below:

Let's say we take the sentence:
_"I like this mod"_
What this mod does is that it jumps around from the first to last character in the sentence, in the end, making up a seemingly jumbled up text. In this scenario, the text will come out as
_"Id olmi ksei ht"_

![Gif of this mod working in a server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99f9b756e60f5a641b8c877b777a35aafee40ef8.gif)

This mod also works perfectly in servers:

![With Discord integrated message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c592a28f37c38ffbd439880489364d3a260017.png)

(Here is a very poorly drawn up sketch of how it works)
![A simple example of how this mod works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/879458562a38739423c7b86627b8cd4956456a09.png)
